Exporting database...
task: [backup] kubectl exec my-postgresql-0 -n database -- \
env PGPASSWORD=XXXXXXX pg_dump -U postgres \
--clean --if-exists \
mirror_node > /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup/database-dump.sql

task: [destroy-cluster] echo "🗑️  Deleting Kind clusters..."

task: [destroy-cluster] for cluster in $(kind get clusters); do kind delete cluster --name $cluster; done

task: [restore-clusters] #rm -rf ~/.solo/*; rm -rf test/data/tmp/*;
rm ~/.solo/local-config.yaml || true
$SOLO_COMMAND init
gtimeout 700s $SOLO_COMMAND config ops restore-clusters --input-dir /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup \
--metallb-config /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/metallb-cluster-{index}.yaml \
--zip-password 1234 --zip-file /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup/solo-backup.zip || true
# keep a copy of zip file for debugging
cp /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup/solo-backup.zip ~/.solo/logs

task: [restore-config] echo "********** before restore config ***********"
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key  || true

kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

$SOLO_COMMAND config ops restore-config -d external-database-test-deployment --input-dir /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup

echo "********** after restore config ***********"
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

# restart pod to make new configMaps/Secrets effective
kubectl delete pod network-node1-0 -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1
kubectl delete pod network-node2-0 -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c2

# refresh Helm release state so helm get all reflects restored values
helm upgrade --reuse-values --namespace external-database-test \
--kube-context kind-solo-e2e-c1 solo-deployment oci://ghcr.io/hashgraph/solo-charts/solo-deployment || true

$SOLO_COMMAND config ops restore-config -d external-database-test-deployment --input-dir /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup

sleep 30
echo "********** after restart pods  ***********"
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

Release "solo-deployment" has been upgraded. Happy Helming!
NAME: solo-deployment
LAST DEPLOYED: Thu Jan  8 00:48:58 2026
NAMESPACE: external-database-test
STATUS: deployed
REVISION: 3
NOTES:
Get the name of the envoy gateway system:
  export ENVOY_SERVICE=$(kubectl get svc -n envoy-gateway-system --selector=gateway.envoyproxy.io/owning-gateway-namespace="${NAMESPACE}",gateway.envoyproxy.io/owning-gateway-name=solo -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}")

Forward a port on the gateway to a local port:
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system "${LOCAL_PORT}":"${GATEWAY_PORT}" &

Some examples, that for convenience, use the same local port as that on the gateway:

To access the Hedera Mirror Node Explorer locally (port 8888 on the gateway):
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system 8888:8888 &
  open http://127.0.0.1:8888

To access the GRPC port of node 2 (starting port 52000 for node 0 on the gateway):
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system 52002:52002 &

To access the GRPC secure (TLS) port of node 1 (starting port 53000 for node 0 on the gateway):
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system 53001:53001 &

To access the gossip port of node 0 (starting port 51000 for node 0 on the gateway):
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system 51000:51000 &

To access the GRPC web port of node 5 (starting port 18000 for node 0 on the gateway):
  kubectl port-forward "svc/${ENVOY_SERVICE}" -n envoy-gateway-system 18005:18005 &

apiVersion: v1
data:
  s-private-node2.pem: 
  s-public-node1.pem: 
  s-public-node2.pem:

metadata:
  creationTimestamp: "2026-01-08T06:44:00Z"
  labels:
    solo.hedera.com/node-name: node2
  name: network-node2-keys-secrets

type: Opaque
task: [restore-config] echo "Restoring database from dump..."
Restoring database from dump...
task: [restore-config] kubectl cp /Users/jeffrey/solo/examples/multicluster-backup-restore/solo-backup/database-dump.sql \
my-postgresql-0:/tmp/database-dump.sql -n database

task: [restore-config] kubectl exec my-postgresql-0 -n database -- \
env PGPASSWORD=XXXXXXX psql -U postgres \
-d mirror_node -f /tmp/database-dump.sql >> database-restore.log 2>&1

task: [restore-config] echo "✅ Database restored"
✅ Database restored
task: [default] echo "********** after restore before restart ***********"
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node1-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test --context kind-solo-e2e-c1 -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.crt || true
kubectl exec -it network-node2-0 -c root-container -n external-database-test -- cat /opt/hgcapp/services-hedera/HapiApp2.0/hedera.key || true

helm get all solo-deployment -n external-database-test > after-restore-config-helm.txt || true  
$SOLO_COMMAND consensus node start --deployment external-database-test-deployment || {
  status=$?
  $SOLO_COMMAND deployment diagnostics all --deployment external-database-test-deployment
  exit "$status"
}
